run_summary.summary: Scanned 6 more emails — 1 deal updated (Flexsteel), 0 new deals. Key update: Kenny already replied to Ian (Popfly) with the full Flexsteel filming schedule — Video 1 filming Tue Apr 21, draft to Popfly by ~Apr 25; Steinhafels visit Apr 23 for Video 2 footage; Video 2 draft ~Apr 28; Video 3 after parents return from FL (~May 12). Posts 1 week apart. FYI: Hawke Media 'Expert Transition' thread is an internal account manager change (NOT a brand deal) — Carolina is out, Alisa Gofman is Liz's new paid-social contact, call confirmed Wed Apr 22 at 10am PST. Everything else from the last run still stands: Dreo window closes Apr 30 (urgent), JLab payment due Apr 20, xTool decision needed, Ollie's needs the Permission to Film Slip, Bark payment due Apr 24.

suggestions.message: Posting window closes April 30 and Yaki (yakiii@vanzomedia.com) hasn't responded since Liz's Apr 14 follow-up. Liz quoted $3K on Apr 1. If no response by Friday Apr 18, this deal is likely dead. One more nudge ASAP — or decide to walk away.
March campaign payment ($2,000) is due 4/20/26. No payment received as of Apr 13 — worth a quick check-in with your JLab contact to confirm it's coming.

Laura confirmed the P3 laser ($10K product value) is gifted/in-kind only — no cash budget right now. She's asking for Liz's content vision before locking anything in. Decision time: accept the gifted deal, counter for a paid add-on, or pass? If yes, reply to gengchunhong@xtool.com with your content ideas.
Ollie's sent the Permission to Film Slip — download it and bring a printed copy to the store before filming. Also check the restricted store locations list. Don't show up without the slip!

The 'Expert Transition' thread is an internal Hawke Media handoff — NOT a brand deal. Carolina stepped away; Alisa Gofman (agofman@hawkemedia.com) is now your paid social contact. You confirmed a sync call Wednesday Apr 22 at 10am PST.

deals.next_action: Film Video 1 (aim for Tue Apr 21) and upload draft to Popfly by ~Apr 25; Steinhafels visit Apr 23 for Video 2 footage
deals.notes: [Apr 16]: Kenny replied to Ian confirming filming schedule — Video 1 filming Tue Apr 21, draft to Popfly by ~Apr 25; Steinhafels visit Apr 23 for Video 2; Video 2 draft ~Apr 28; Video 3 after parents return from FL (~May 12, film that following week). Posts go live 1 week apart. Invoice submitted via Popfly at project completion.
deals.activity_note: Apr 16: Kenny confirmed filming/draft schedule to Ian — Video 1 by ~Apr 25, Video 2 by ~Apr 28 (post Steinhafels Apr 23), Video 3 after May 12

deals.next_action: Decide whether to accept xTool gifted collab (P3 laser, $10K value) or push for paid component — if yes, reply to Laura with content vision
deals.notes:
[Apr 16]: Laura replied — P3 laser ($10K value) offered as gifted/in-kind only. No cash budget. She wants Liz's content vision first: 'We'd like to start from your vision and then build the collaboration together.' Liz had asked about paid options and deliverables.
[Apr 16]: Liz replied to Laura asking about paid collab budget, deliverables, and goals — cc'd Kenny.
deals.activity_note: Apr 16: xTool (Laura) replied — gifted/in-kind only, $10K P3 laser. No cash. Waiting on our decision.

deals.next_action: Follow up with Hana if no creator list decision by early May
deals.notes: [Apr 16]: Hana (Taskmetas) replied to Liz's Apr 15 follow-up — brand is still building their creator list, no decision yet. Deal has been in limbo since Feb 25 (2 months). Still alive.
deals.activity_note: Apr 16: Hana confirmed HelloFresh still finalizing creator list — no decision yet, been stalled 2 months

deals.next_action: Download Permission to Film Slip and schedule filming at Ollie's store (check restricted locations list first)
